Leather.flavorText: Tanning stabilizes collagens, ensuring the skin does not rot when wet.

Longbow.description: A powerful, but heavy long-range weapon.
Longbow.flavorText: Xeno-biologists hurriedly altered the genes of the tree from which this weapon is made, so that it might thrive on Icarus, never imagining that one day, a bow would be fashioned from it.

Lantern.description: A portable, animal-fat-powered light, can be refilled on crafting bench.

Leather_Head.description: Headgear, providing some insulation and damage protection.

Leather_Chest.description: A basic cuirass, gives limited insulation and damage protection

Leather_Feet.description: Roughly made boots, increase temperature and damage resistance.

Leather_Arms.description: Gauntlets, providing basic protection and insulation.

Leather_Legs.description: Simple chausses, improving insulation and damage resistance.

Light_Worklamp_Directional.description: A basic lamp for illuminating a large area.

Light_Worklamp_Omnidirectional.description: A fluorescent lamp for illuminating a large area.

Lily.description: A wildflower reputed to have medicinal properties.
Lily.flavorText: Adapting to the exotics-infused soil of Icarus, this lily has acquired unusual and useful new chemical properties.

LightningRod_Basic.description: Channels lightning strikes safely toward the ground, saving structures from fiery destruction.
LightningRod_Basic.flavorText: The effect of Minos\'s gravitational tides on the atmosphere creates extraordinarily powerful electrical storms, making these devices indispensible.

Leather_Curtain_Door.flavorText: A door for those unimpressed by hinges and handles.

Large_Advanced_Aquarium.description: A very fancy large fish tank for keeping your favourite finned friends around, must be connected to both power and water.
Large_Advanced_Aquarium.flavorText: The latest technology for storing your fish friends.

Layered_Plating.flavorText: Simple enough to make on the surface, strong enough to protect from harsh weather.

Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Head.description: This tactical armor provides an increase to sprint speed and stamina.
Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Head.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Chest.description: This tactical armor provides an increase to sprint speed and stamina.
Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Chest.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Legs.description: This tactical armor provides an increase to sprint speed and stamina.
Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Legs.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Arms.description: This tactical armor provides an increase to sprint speed and stamina.
Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Arms.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Feet.description: This tactical armor provides an increase to sprint speed and stamina.
Larkwell_Armor_Alpha_Feet.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Lava_Hunter_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Lava Hunter.
Lava_Hunter_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Lava_Broodling_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Lava Broodling.
Lava_Broodling_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Lava_Viscid_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Ignari.
Lava_Viscid_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Land_Shark_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Landshark.
Land_Shark_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Lava_Hunter_Broodling_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Lava_Viscid_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Landshark_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Larkwell_Armor_Black_Head.description: Part of an armor set designed for fighting alongside your creature companions.
Larkwell_Armor_Black_Head.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Black_Chest.description: Part of an armor set designed for fighting alongside your creature companions.
Larkwell_Armor_Black_Chest.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Black_Arms.description: Part of an armor set designed for fighting alongside your creature companions.
Larkwell_Armor_Black_Arms.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Black_Legs.description: Part of an armor set designed for fighting alongside your creature companions.
Larkwell_Armor_Black_Legs.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Larkwell_Armor_Black_Feet.description: Part of an armor set designed for fighting alongside your creature companions.
Larkwell_Armor_Black_Feet.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez: Your Companion In Adventure

Lava_Hunter_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

LegendaryWeapon_Black_Wolf_Revolver.description: A Prototype Upgradeable Revolver created via studying of the Black Wolf.
LegendaryWeapon_Black_Wolf_Revolver.flavorText: Someone at Norex was a fan of old westerns.

LegendaryWeapon_Scorpion_Rifle.description: A Prototype Upgradeable Rifle created via studying of the Giant Scorpion.
LegendaryWeapon_Scorpion_Rifle.flavorText: How did Norex turn a Scorpion into a Rifle? You know what, I don\'t wanna know.

LegendaryWeapon_Sandworm_Crossbow.description: A Prototype Upgradeable Javelin Launcher created via studying of the Sandworm.
LegendaryWeapon_Sandworm_Crossbow.flavorText: Norex knows we need to carry these things, right?

Limestone_Floor.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Frame.description: A sturdy frame to build with.
Limestone_Frame.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Wall.description: An elegant base for your base.
Limestone_Wall.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Wall_Angle.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Ramp.description: An elegant option for any construction.
Limestone_Ramp.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Beam.description: A beam that provides both style and function.
Limestone_Beam.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Roof_Corner.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Half_Pitch.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone_Halfpiece.description: An elegant half-piece for your walls.
Limestone_Halfpiece.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Limestone.description: A chunk of limestone that can be used in a variety of ways.
Limestone.flavorText: Back on Earth, Limestone as Calcium Carbonate is used in some medicines to soothe an upset stomach. Icarus Limestone is poisonous. Do NOT eat.

Landing_Pad_Player.description: When placed, new dropships will land in this location. You can call your dropship to this location, if unoccupied. Requires Electricity to use.
Landing_Pad_Player.flavorText: What goes up, must come down.

LightningRod_Platinum.description: Channels lightning strikes safely toward the ground, saving structures from fiery destruction. Can be connected to a power network to charge batteries when struck.
LightningRod_Platinum.flavorText: The effect of Minos\'s gravitational tides on the atmosphere creates extraordinarily powerful electrical storms, making these devices indispensible.

Lava_Hunter_Mine.description: When placed will break open Lava Hunter Eggs and Release Bombers.
Lava_Hunter_Mine.flavorText: Let\'s see how they like it.

Lava_Hunter_Backpack.description: A powered backpack that emits an aura of warmth. Can be recharged at the Charging Station.
Lava_Hunter_Backpack.flavorText: Who would have thought carrying around a lava core was good idea.

Lava_Hunter_Attachment.description: An attachment that grants fire damage and chance to burn on melee weapons.
Lava_Hunter_Attachment.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid melee weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Lava_Hunter_Module.flavorText: A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Lava Hunter Creature.

Lava_Hunter_Sickle.description: A Sickle crafted from the spoils of victory against a Lava Hunter.
Lava_Hunter_Sickle.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Lava_Hunter_Chair.description: A Throne crafted from the spoils of victory against a Lava Hunter.
Lava_Hunter_Chair.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Lava_Hunter_Feature.description: A preserved specimen from a Lava Hunter that once lived on Icarus.
Lava_Hunter_Feature.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Lava_Hunter_Magma.description: A piece of tough magma taken from the body of a great beast.

Lava_Hunter_Horn.description: A piece of horn taken from the body of a great beast.

LegendaryWeapon_GolemGauntlet.description: A Prototype Upgradeable Gauntlet created via studying of the Quarrite. Primarily used for mining.
LegendaryWeapon_GolemGauntlet.flavorText: The first step in Norex\'s efforts towards an Exoskeleton.

LegendaryWeapon_Ape_Club.description: A Prototype Upgradeable Club created via studying of the Garganutan.
LegendaryWeapon_Ape_Club.flavorText: An Ape Club? Real original, Norex

Licence.description: A Licence which allows the purchasing of a Legendary Item.
Licence.flavorText: Granted by the Norex Special Weapons Division.

LegendaryWeapon_SlugLauncher.description: A Prototype Upgradeable Launcher created via studying of the Hammerhead Slug.
LegendaryWeapon_SlugLauncher.flavorText: Another Weird Norex Invention, this one shoots Slime?

LegendaryWeapon_LavaHunter_FlameThrower.description: A Prototype Upgradeable Flamethrower created via studying of the Lava Hunter.
LegendaryWeapon_LavaHunter_FlameThrower.flavorText: Norex just wants to watch the world burn.

LegendaryWeapon_IceMammoth_Sledgehammer.description: A Prototype Upgradeable Sledgehammer created via studying of the Rimetusk mutated mammoth.
LegendaryWeapon_IceMammoth_Sledgehammer.flavorText: A Giant Sledgehammer made from a Mutated Mammoth. Thanks Norex.

Lab_Stool.description: A basic metal stool, a little worse for wear.

LegendaryWeapon_IceMammoth_Sledgehammer_.description: Frozen water, can be melted for drinking.
LegendaryWeapon_IceMammoth_Sledgehammer_.flavorText: Store in a chilly bin or add to a campfire, with a water vessel, to collect drinkable water.

LegendaryWeapon_Bow.description: A Prototype Upgradeable Bow created via studying of the Rimetusk mutated mammoth.
LegendaryWeapon_Bow.flavorText: A Masterwork Bow - Created by our Friends at Norex.

LegendaryWeapon_Sniper.description: A Prototype Upgradeable Sniper created via studying of the Garganutan.
LegendaryWeapon_Sniper.flavorText: What the UDA should have Armed Prospectors with.

Lithium_Ore.description: The core component for the creation of high tier energy storage devices.

Lithium_Refined.description: Refined Lithium that is ready to be used in the creation of batteries and electrical components.

Lithium_Axe.description: An axe expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Axe.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Pickaxe.description: A pickaxe expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Pickaxe.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Knife.description: A knife expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Knife.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Spear.description: A spear expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Spear.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Sickle.description: A sickle expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Sickle.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Sledgehammer.description: A sledgehammer expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Sledgehammer.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Throwing_Knife.description: A throwing knife expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Throwing_Spear.description: A javelin expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Bow.description: A bow expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Bow.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Crossbow.description: A crossbow expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Crossbow.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Lithium_Shield.description: A shield expertly crafted with Lithium.
Lithium_Shield.flavorText: The periodic table never looked this sharp.

Legs_Attachment_Jump_1.description: An attachment that increases jump height and decreases stamina cost.
Legs_Attachment_Jump_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid armor piece at an Alteration Bench.

Legs_Attachment_Jump_2.description: An attachment that increases jump height and decreases stamina cost.
Legs_Attachment_Jump_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid armor piece at an Alteration Bench.

Laser_Tripwire_Enemy.description: Explodes when the laser is broken.

Laser_Pistol.description: A compact device that creates hard light bullets through a complication process of focusing energy through a ruby lens.

Laser_Attachment_Fire.description: Converts Laser Collision Damage into Fire.

Laser_Attachment_Frost.description: Converts Laser Collision Damage into Frost.

Laser_Attachment_Electric.description: Converts Laser Collision Damage into Electric.

Laser_Attachment_Poison.description: Converts Laser Collision Damage into Fire.

Lithium_Bolt.description: An electrically charged bolt, carefully crafted using lithium harvested from Icarus.

Lithium_Arrow.description: An electrically charged arrow, carefully crafted using lithium harvested from Icarus.

Landing_Pad_Prop.description: Landing Pads used Exclusively by TPS.
Landing_Pad_Prop.flavorText: What goes up, must come down.

Lamb_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Lamb_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.
